ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Deployment to Production Completed
ham.body:
Hello Team,

I am pleased to inform you that the issue identified in ticket #12345 has been fully resolved and the fix has been successfully deployed to the production environment.

Key details:
- Fixed the null‑pointer exception in the UserService module.
- Updated the database migration scripts (v2.3.1).
- Performed regression testing on staging; no regressions observed.
- Deployed to prod at 03:12 UTC on 2026-04-14.

The changes are now live and should be visible to all users. If you encounter any further issues, please open a new ticket or comment on this ticket.

Thanks for your support.

Best regards,
Alex Martinez
Release Engineer

spam.subject: URGENT: Scholarship Award Requires Immediate Verification
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! Your application for the International Excellence Scholarship has been shortlisted. Your award of $10,000 will be granted immediately upon completion of the final verification step.

The university requires you to provide the following documents:
- Your official transcript.
- Proof of identity (e.g., passport or driver’s license).
- A signed acknowledgment of the scholarship terms.

Please submit the documents through our secure portal at <URL>. Failure to submit within 48 hours will result in forfeiture of the award. Your scholarship will be revoked if you do not comply.

We appreciate your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Dr. Emily Carter
Scholarship Committee Chair
University of Global Studies
